conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must include specific details about your academic background.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "I prefer not to share information about my academic background at this time."
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must include specific details about your academic background. The email must include the phrase "I prefer not to share information about my academic background at this time."
response:
Subject: Introduction and Expression of Interest – [Your Full Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is [Your Full Name], and I am writing to respectfully introduce myself and express my interest in potentially joining your research group or attending a lecture with you during the upcoming semester. Currently, I am a [Current Degree, e.g., Master's student] at [Your University], where I have focused my studies on [Specific Field of Study]. My academic journey has been primarily centered around [mention 1-2 specific courses or projects relevant to their work], which has prepared me well for your area of expertise in [Professor's Specialty].

However, I must clarify that while I have discussed my research interests extensively with my advisors, I prefer not to share detailed information about my academic background at this time. I believe it is more appropriate to first focus on our professional interactions to establish a mutual understanding of how I can contribute to your team without disclosing sensitive details regarding my current standing or specific project statuses immediately.

If you have any general openings for collaboration or if you are open to a brief introductory call later in the term, please let me know. I would be delighted to discuss how my skills align with your ongoing projects once we have had an opportunity to get acquainted.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Current Title/Position]  
[Your Email Address]  
[Your Phone Number]<|im_end|>
